subHeadline: A permanent, categorised reference — not symptom-chasing blog posts. Every entry links to a full breakdown of symptoms, root cause, mileage window, repair cost, and replacement cost.

rows.title: N47 Timing Chain Failure
rows.description: The defining BMW diesel issue and our #1 enquiry driver. Cold-start rattle from the rear of the engine is the early warning; ignored, chain slip means full engine replacement. 1,450 enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED]. £3,200–£5,500 recon [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: B58 Coolant Leaks
rows.description: The modern straight-six's primary weak point — expansion tank, water pump, and plastic fittings all degrade over time. Well-understood, non-catastrophic if caught early. 540 enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED]. £400–£800 repair [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: N57 Turbocharger & Timing Chain Wear
rows.description: Similar rear-chain complexity to N47, plus turbocharger failure at higher mileages. The 330d/530d workhorse has known weak points. 830 enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED]. £1,200–£2,500 repair; £4,500–£7,000 recon [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: N63 Valve Stem Seals
rows.description: Hot-vee architecture causes heat-related seal failure at 60k–100k miles. Known as the "N63 nightmare." 440 enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED]. £3,000–£6,000 repair; £6,000–£10,000 recon [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: S63 Timing Chain Tensioner
rows.description: High-performance M-division V8 with similar weaknesses to N63. Chain tensioner wear can lead to catastrophic failure. 410 enquiries in 2025 [BMW-VERIFIED]. Engine replacement often required at £9,000–£14,000 recon [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: Cold-Start Rattle
rows.description: The N47's signature symptom — 1-2 seconds of chain noise on start-up. The earlier it's caught, the cheaper the fix. Ignored, it becomes a £3,200–£5,500 recon [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: Loss of Power / Limp Mode
rows.description: Multiple causes — turbo failure, EGR clogging, DPF blockage, or HPFP failure on N54/N55. The N54's HPFP is the defining petrol issue.

rows.title: Coolant Loss (No Visible Leak)
rows.description: B58/N63 expansion tank or water pump failure — can lead to overheating if ignored. The B58's most common failure, costing £400–£800 to repair [BMW-QUOTE].

rows.title: Blue Smoke on Start-Up
rows.description: N63 valve stem seal failure — oil seeping past seals into the combustion chamber. The telltale sign of the "N63 nightmare."
